word: H2579 - חֲמַת רַבָּה - Chămath Rabbâh - kham-ath' rab-baw' - Chamath-Rabbah

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמת רבּה

Transliteration: chămath rabbâh

Phonetic: kham-ath' rab-baw'

BDB Definition:

Hamath-Rabbah = "enclosure of wrath-populous"
  1. a town site unknown; maybe same as 'Hammath'

Origin: from H2574 and H7237

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
